Noctivagant Blade  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 26
DMG: 18 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +10 INT: +15
WT: 0.4 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

cheapo for SK
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2005 at 2:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592274452040
130 posts
shaded blade and shissir knight blade, good DPS for lower levels, especially 10- with damage caps, and 10+ go for shaded blade till 30's then get a longblade o vitality. u need to skip this blade :-P
▲ Page top
cheapo for SK
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2013 at 7:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609114694105
118 posts
Given the Longblade of Vitality is req lvl 56, thats out of the question for twinks. The shaded blade is 12dmg 24dly and the shissar knight sword is 10dmg and 22 delay. 6 more damage and 2 more delay out weighs the shaded blade and the knights sword is laughable. the only advantage would be for more swings = faster skill ups. I would chose the Noc blade over these any day of the week and twice on sunday.

QuoteReply
# May 14 2004 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362263273
5 posts
Was selling a couple Lammy's in Bazaar and got offered a Noctivagant for both Lammy's. We traded and both left happy. Now I just need an SK to go try this baby out. Pricing on 7th is about 3k for Noct, Lammy's are going 1-1.5k.

Good Hunting,
-Kelfar
Ranger of Karana on 7th

heh
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2004 at 7:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259825326
8 posts
Picked up one of these to replace lammy, works great. I love the added int, and dex. I have this + sarnark battle shield for 1hs, steel rod of the knight for 2hb, and war marshall's bladed staff for 2hs and I can honestly say I couldnt be more happier with my weapons of choice

1 post
this is a nice wepon for a sk good damage and delay and can't forget the +15 int thats a nice cheap blade

QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 7:23 AM Rating: Decent

1 post
I bought it for 800 pp on sebilis. I think it's a very good sword (for my lvl 5 it was very very good)
▲ Page top
Definetly Better
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2003 at 1:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798405702
11 posts
I upgraded my sk from MoSS to this blade quite awhile ago.. when I had the MoSS my skills raised much slower, the minute I armed this nice blade my skills started moving up damned quick. The price varies.. I didn't pay a thing for mine.. I traded it as an even swap the sellers Noct. for my Scimitar of the Emerald Dawn (had just deleted my pali) they sell for about the same on Torv.

Currently these are my weapon choices

Noct. & Acrylia Inlaid Shield

And to practice 2hs I just bought Scythe of Eternal Ice for 250pp!

Personally I am very happy with my choices in upgrades and would never look at MoSS again for anything short of twinking a newbie SK. (Currently on Torv Noct usually goes for 4-6k.. MoSS goes for 10-50PP.. GREAT twink item.. but if you can afford the upgrade, it is MORE than worth it!)

__DEL__1591784116788
1 post
picked one up for 2.5k on torv-- aside from my haste item, it's the best use i've made of my plat so far. i'd recommend it to any sk looking for a good 1hs that will serve them well for quite some time.

and anyone who says moss is better is either being sarcastic or fishing for a low price on noct-- i could train a chimpanzee to look at noct then look at moss, and type which is the better weapon.

__DEL__1591754074059
28 posts
Just picked one up in the Bazaar on Luclin server for 3.5k, and I must admit the stats help out greatly for my clumbsy dumb ogre. Also with the extra bash damage we've been getting since the patch (been bashing upto 80 damage with a sbs after a str tap ) makes useing this weapon a pleasure.

My 2H slash sux cuz of its greatness!
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2002 at 3:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758570150
14 posts
I saw one on quellios in bazaar for 4.2K... it was an amazing price... but was still more money id ever seen... so i got the money... took over a month...but i finally did it! since ive been using the 'rusty mace' MOSS i was bad at both 2H and 1H... so i bought anyways cuz it rules... and the fact i wont be getting asked for rez anymore. Now i mastered 1H blunt and slash but 2H slash still sux... argh. What is a good 2H slash weapon better than 20/42 that is cheap? ill shut up now...

Uumdi Duumdi

RE: My 2H slash sux cuz of its greatness!
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2002 at 8:03 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
If you don't already have a haste item, check out the mithril two handed sword. It's 21/40, but the built in haste makes it 21/31, but with the damage bonus of a 40 delay.

Also, if you want dirt cheap, or already have haste, get a blackened alloy ******* sword. 24/39, and about 50-100pp.

114 posts
U might like argent defender. pretty decent 2hs. and on the AB server its about 300pp now. when it was a great weapon b4 all this twinking and stuff grrrr!!
▲ Page top
bonus damage
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2002 at 11:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778989850
3 posts
i just got one, then i got it the bonus damage was 4, when i hit lvl 40 the bonus damage increased to 5. a friend of mine a lvl 53 sk has one also, and her bonus is up to 9, not sure what the top out is. thats what is special about this blade.
▲ Page top
RE: bonus damage
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2002 at 4:43 AM Rating: Decent
KalRox
View User Forum
282 posts
OMG ! some people still don't get it. i will say it 1 more time: for 1 hand weapons, damage bonus is dependened on level,and level(of the wielder) only. all my 1 hand weapons now have a bonus of 10, and if i pick up a rusty dagger ,it also has a damage bonus of 10.
for 2 handers ,only level of wielder and the delay of the weapon determine the damage bonus.
(higher delay, higher bonus).

Roxas Nitehowler
57 outrider of illumanati
MM
____________________________
hunter Roxas Nitehowler
Plainswalker of illumanati
MM, EQ

hunter Roxas
WoW retired
▲ Page top
moss is better
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 2:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1633306622282
429 posts
why moss is better

moss is 19/29 where noc is 18/26, 3 delay really isn't worth paying 10 times as much, and 10 dex isn't ethier, 5 int will generally give you 50 mana(at higher lvs) but that still doesn't make noc a better wep, the main factor i used to consider the betterness was price, moss=400-500pp noc = 4000-5000pp
▲ Page top
RE: moss is better
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 6:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759621764
257 posts
Yeah right. You're just saying that to drive down the price of the Noct Blade so you can buy one cheaper. Otherwise you would not be on this site but more likely on the MoSS site praising about how good a MoSS is.

QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 1:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255612465
2 posts
p00n keep thinking that ....
▲ Page top
RE: moss is better
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2002 at 5:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780632917
203 posts
ok lets look at the stats, MoSS: 19/29 ratio 1.526 +10int wt2.6
Noct: 18/26 Dex10 int15 wt0.4 ratio: 1.444
the dex will help your self cast procs hit more often and the int means you learn skills faster and have more mana for that snare or the extra HP life tap that might just save your life, and the low wt will help keep your sta from falling so you wont loose AGI or AC that way, also MoSS looks like a stupid rusty mace and Noct has a very cool look to it. need I say more?

<flame off>

Peace out, lookin to buy one of these on Ayonae Ro Send me a tell as Vumdiar or Kanvarwen mainly
▲ Page top
RE: moss is better
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2002 at 6:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777626262
24 posts
You may be right about the fact that 3 delay in itself isnt much but the ratio of the damage/delay on this weapon is much better than a MoSS. I am currently using a MoSS and am going to upgrade it. As SKs are a melee class Dex can be very important and 5 extra to INT certainly isn't bad. I don't really see where you get that a MoSS is better. On a side note on Povar (not sure which server youre on) a MoSS will go anywhere from 500-1k Noc can be hefty but never 5k from what ive seen and the only instance its actually 10 times more is if you happen to have someone selling at the lowest and someone selling at the highest prices. This is rare.

Edited, Tue Aug 6 07:24:27 2002
▲ Page top
RE: moss is better
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2002 at 7:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254202386
37 posts

just bought a noc blade on BB for 1200p and i seen another one for sale in auction channel at same time going for 1500p or best offer. its worth paying the extra 1k for this sword

▲ Page top
Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779356569
5 posts
Noticed today after getting lvl 28 the sword gains a damage bonus.
▲ Page top
RE: Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 2:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776257072
20 posts
That would be because at level 28, and every three levels thereafter (if you're a melee) you get a 1 point increase on damage bonus. damage bonus is NOT by weapon. It's by level (and delay is factored in for 2h weapons).
▲ Page top
RE: Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 12:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770854683
2 posts
Actually ur wrong. it factors in both. swords have 1 dmg bonus and axes and scythes have anoter for 2hand slashing. for 1hs blunt,piercing they do vary, but you were right about how i goes up every couple of levels. For instance my Shieldtorm had a dmg bonus of 8 at 35-36 and a scythe had 9dmg bonus at the same levels.
▲ Page top
That poster was right
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2003 at 9:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760712291
Sage
70 posts
Damage Bonus for all one-handers depends on level. Nothing to do with the weapon. Damage Bonus for two-handers depend on delay and your one-handed damage bonus.
▲ Page top
